ai_sources.section_subtitle: These sources power the AI analytics module. Without them, suggestions will be less accurate
ai_sources.hint_demo_alert: The AI assistant is running in demo mode on static data. For real suggestions, connect at least POS and Inventory.
ai_sources.connector_sftp_download_templates: Download CSV templates for client developers
ai_sources.connector_sftp_hint: Share this archive with the client's developers. They will populate the templates with data from their system and upload them on schedule to this SFTP. Our system will automatically detect and connect the sources.
ai_sources.connector_api_note: For large clients with their own systems (1C, ERP). Which data we receive via this key — will be marked by our developers after setup. Just access here.
ai_sources.connector_universal_desc: One access = multiple data sources automatically. Supports 2 connection modes — API key and file-based (CSV via SFTP). File mode is the most practical for most clients.

pos.title: POS (Checkouts)
pos.description: Receipt tape — who buys what in real time. Used for OOS forecasting and promo analysis.

inventory.title: Shelf inventory
inventory.description: SKU-level stock levels. Powers OOS forecasting and slow-mover detection.

supply.title: Supply chain
supply.description: Delivery schedule and incoming goods. Lets AI predict OOS risk before the shelf empties.

promo.title: Promo activities
promo.description: Promo calendar, prices, planograms. AI suggests shelf tasks ahead of promo launches.

marketing_channel.title: Marketing channel
marketing_channel.description: Where to automatically post approved promotions with photos after task completion.
marketing_channel.note: In the admin we only see the fact 'sent to channel X'. The actual publication (post format, images, tags, discount price) is handled by the backend / external marketing platform.

ai_banner.text: This month completion rate grew by 2.1 p.p. driven by improvements in SPAR Tomsk stores. Weak point — return rate at Food City Lenin Ave 217 (8.2% vs 5% norm). Possible causes: new staff, insufficient training.

ai_banner.text: AI assistant noticed: hour spend increased by 2.6% above plan. Main contributors — SPAR Tomsk Lenin Ave 80 (+12%) and SPAR Novosibirsk Krasny Ave (+9%). SPAR Tomsk Lenin has many 'Perishables Control' tasks (possible supply issue). Want details?

reportsCompare.page_subtitle: Network benchmarking — leaders, laggards and trends

ai_banner.text: AI noticed: leading stores (SPAR Tomsk Lenin Ave, FC Tomsk Global Market) show completion rate >92%. Laggards (Food City Lenin Ave 217 — 78%) have a higher return rate driven by rapid staff growth. Suggested actions: strengthen onboarding for new employees, add guidelines to high-return tasks.
